name: Z-Scored OFI Proxy > 2.5
hypothesis: Continuing to tighten the z-score threshold for OFI proxy from 2.0 to 2.5 (a ~99.4th percentile event) should isolate the most extreme order flow imbalances. These rare events are hypothesized to have the strongest predictive power, leading to a higher win rate and expectancy, though trade frequency will be very low.
mutation_note: Following feedback analyst recommendation to 'tighten_threshold' again. Increased threshold from 2.0 to 2.5 to fully characterize the signal's strength at its extremes.
